posts.title: Why Small Homelabs Need Better Secrets Management
posts.excerpt: Self-hosted services break when secrets sprawl across .env files and sticky notes. Here’s how to clean that up without going full enterprise theater.
posts.meta_description: Practical secrets-management advice for small homelabs: unique admin passwords, a sane shared store like Vaultwarden, clear separation between machine and human credentials, and documentation so rebuilds don’t hurt.

posts.title: Welcome To The Tech Blog
posts.excerpt: Why this blog exists and what will show up here across security, AI, cloud infrastructure, and homelabbing.
posts.meta_description: An introduction to Dan Duggan's tech blog covering security, AI, cloud infrastructure, and homelabbing.
